# EliteApply

> EliteApply is a student-controlled scholarship application workspace for organising applications, deadlines, requirements, documents, writing, references and submission readiness.

EliteApply helps applicants keep each opportunity connected to the evidence and actions required to complete it. It does not find scholarships automatically, predict admissions decisions, guarantee funding or submit applications without the student’s review.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://eliteapply.net/): Product overview and core value proposition.
- [Product preview](https://eliteapply.net/product-preview): Interactive preview of the application workspace.
- [Features](https://eliteapply.net/features): Application tracking, writing, documents, references and readiness.
- [How it works](https://eliteapply.net/how-it-works): The four-stage application workflow.
- [For students](https://eliteapply.net/for-students): Applicant use cases and supported workflows.
- [Pricing](https://eliteapply.net/pricing): Current access and plan information.
- [Security](https://eliteapply.net/security): Account, session, data export and deletion controls.

## Feature documentation

- [Scholarship application tracker](https://eliteapply.net/features/scholarship-application-tracker)
- [Personal statement workspace](https://eliteapply.net/features/personal-statement-workspace)

- [Reference tracking](https://eliteapply.net/features/reference-tracking)
- [Submission readiness](https://eliteapply.net/features/submission-readiness)

## Policies and contact

- [Accessibility](https://eliteapply.net/accessibility)
- [Contact](https://eliteapply.net/contact)
- Support: support@eliteapply.net

Authenticated workspace routes under `/app/` contain private user data and must not be indexed or treated as public documentation.
